# Fixture: no_shifts_no_lock_icon
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 12.4s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Rachel! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: How do I find the orientation
Concierge: Look for the In-app orientation card on your home screen.
Partner: It's not there
Concierge: Go to the Shifts tab and tap on any shift with a lock icon.
Partner: No shift available is what I have under shifts

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Shift availability varies by location and changes daily. Keep checking the Shifts tab over the next few days — new shifts are added regularly. If you continue not seeing any shifts, email support@shiftsmart.com to confirm your area is active.
